case_title: HERNANDO, ADRIAN vs. VARGAS, RICKY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, RICKY
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDO, ADRIAN

JUDGE PRO-TEM ARNOLD EVJIE II 3:30 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. IN THE JURY ROOM, CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSS. OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 15 LAPIDGE STREET, APT. # 1, SF, CA, BACK RENTS/DAMAGES INCLUDING ATTYS FEES/COSTS FOR $4,856.14. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXECUTION STAYED ON OR BEFORE 8AM 10/6/93. DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO SEEK FURTHER STAY; TO LEAVE PREMISES FREE OF ALL OCCUPANTS; WAIVES RIGHT TO SECURITY DEPOSIT; THAT HE IS THE ONLY OCCUPANT, MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. IF DEFT FULFILLS THESE CONDITIONS, PLTF. TO WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS/DAMAGES & FEES/COSTS & PLTF. WILL VACATE JUDGMENT IF DEFT IS IN DEFAULT, PLTF. WILL MOVE FOR THE EXECUTION OF THIS JUDGMENT. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, RICKY

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, RICKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 LAPIDGE STREET, APT. #1, S.F CA 94110 $4,856.14 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,856.14, STAYED UNTIL OCT-06-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS/DAMAGES INCLUDING ATTYS FEES, IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH THE CONDITIONS AGREED UPON. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDO, ADRIAN SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-14-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
